name: Baby Showers
shortDescription: Daytime social gatherings with brunch menus and the lush patio atmosphere.
heroImageAlt: Coco Maya elevated patio set up for a daytime baby shower in Little Italy San Diego
seoTitle: Baby Shower Venue in Little Italy San Diego | Coco Maya
seoDescription: Host a baby shower on Coco Maya's elevated patio in Little Italy, San Diego. Brunch menus, daytime availability, and a bright, photo-friendly setting.
intro: Our elevated patio in daylight is one of the prettiest settings in Little Italy for a daytime celebration, bright, open-air, and full of greenery.
We build baby shower packages around brunch and lunch menus, with room for games, gifts, and the group photo everyone actually wants.
Most baby showers book a reserved patio section for a late-morning to early-afternoon window, giving the group natural light for photos and enough time to eat, open gifts, and actually visit.

highlights.label: Bright, Open-Air Patio
highlights.detail: Daylight setting with greenery, one of the more photogenic daytime spaces in Little Italy.

highlights.label: Brunch & Lunch Menus
highlights.detail: Build a package around our brunch or lunch offerings, suited to a daytime celebration.

highlights.label: Reserved Section
highlights.detail: A dedicated section of the patio for groups of 10 to 40 guests.

highlights.label: Space for Gifts & Games
highlights.detail: We can lay out a gift table or small activity area within your reserved section.

highlights.label: Non-Alcoholic Packages
highlights.detail: Mocktail and non-alcoholic drink options alongside the full cocktail and wine list.

faqs.question: What time of day works best for a baby shower?
faqs.answer: Brunch, served daily until 3 PM, or a late-morning to early-afternoon slot both work well, giving you natural light on the patio.

faqs.question: Can you accommodate a mix of alcoholic and non-alcoholic guests?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer mocktail and non-alcoholic drink packages alongside our full cocktail and wine menu.

faqs.question: Is there space for gift tables or a small setup area?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can reserve space for a gift table or small decor setup within your section. Mention it when you inquire so we can plan the layout.

faqs.question: Can we bring our own cake or desserts?
faqs.answer: Yes, outside cakes and desserts are welcome for baby showers. Let us know ahead of time so we can coordinate storage and service.

faqs.question: Is the patio shaded or fully open-air?
faqs.answer: The elevated patio is open-air with some covered areas. We can discuss seating placement based on time of day and weather when you book.
